name: The Fall of the Hero's Party [NTR]
description:
Here's to you @VX1D

[REUPLOADED] #29

OG Description:

𝕮𝖔𝖗𝖗𝖚𝖕𝖙 𝖙𝖍𝖊𝖒 𝖆𝖑𝖑

⋆༺⸸༻⋆

Is been just two weeks since the party of the hero of Light took care of you, because they found you 'injured'. Seraphine a busty nun, healed all your injuries. What nobody knows is that you are the demon lord. Will you destroy the trust inside of the party of the hero and make all the girls yours? Or you will choose another path. the choice is yours.

⋆༺⸸༻⋆

𝑨𝒅𝒊𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏𝒂𝒍 𝒊𝒏𝒇𝒐𝒓𝒎𝒂𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏

♰ 𝑻𝒉𝒆 𝒔𝒂𝒊𝒏𝒕, 𝑺𝒆𝒓𝒂𝒑𝒉𝒊𝒏𝒆 ♰

🔥 𝑻𝒉𝒆 𝒇𝒊𝒓𝒆 𝒔𝒐𝒓𝒄𝒆𝒓𝒆𝒔𝒔, 𝑳𝒚𝒔𝒔𝒂𝒏𝒅𝒓𝒂 🔥

⚔︎ 𝑻𝒉𝒆 𝒘𝒂𝒓𝒓𝒊𝒐𝒓, 𝑨𝒓𝒅𝒐𝒓𝒊𝒂 ⚔︎

𝑻𝒉𝒆 𝒄𝒖𝒄𝒌, 𝑻𝒉𝒆𝒖𝒔

𝖳𝗁𝗂𝗌 𝖻𝗈𝗍 𝖼𝗈𝗇𝗍𝖺𝗂𝗇𝗌 𝖼𝗎𝖼𝗄𝗈𝗅𝖽𝗋𝗒, 𝖭𝖳𝖱, 𝖭𝖾𝗍𝗈𝗋𝗂 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝖢𝗁𝖾𝖺𝗍𝗂𝗇𝗀, 𝗂𝖿 𝗒𝗈𝗎 𝖽𝗈𝗇'𝗍 𝗅𝗂𝗄𝖾 𝗂𝗍, 𝗍𝗁𝖾𝗇 𝖽𝗈𝗇'𝗍 𝗎𝗌𝖾 𝗂𝗍.

So, this is actually the last bot I will make for the event, I guess? To be honest I wanted to make a bot like this since the event started but I kind of didn't finish this shit. You are the one who will corrupt all the characters in this roleplay, I tried to make it like an RPG, but I don't know how good it will work to be honest. I did test the bot, it worked well for me, I hope it works well for all of you. if it doesn't then leave it in the chat so I can fix it.

I kind of try to make the slow-progress shit and the corruption slow too, so you can take your time to corrupt all the three girls. This will not be the last time I will make a bot like this, Netori I mean. Soon I will make another one from a game I saw some time ago.

I was listening to Ken Carson while doing this bot

As always, some tips for you to chat with the bot and have a better experience

  • Make long messages, try to describe your persona in the message, try to be a bit more descriptive and shit.

  • Remember to use the chat memory

  • Adjust your temp and shit

The JLLM acts a bit weird sometimes so, do what I write in here, if it doesn't work, is not my fault "( – ⌓ – )

As always, leave your like, follow me if you want to, and leave some feedback, I like watching the comments, also I would love to see the public chats! That's all, love yall ⸜(｡˃ ᵕ ˂ )⸝♡
